series_metadata.series_description: Record of manufacturing, repacking, or unit dosing of medications. Shows manufacturer, manufacturer lot no., pharmacy lot no., expiration dates, repack size, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 3 years or 1 year beyond the expiration date assigned to the drug being repacked, whichever is longer, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain 3 years or 1 year beyond the expiration date assigned to the drug being repacked, whichever is longer, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
